message:
Fix registry-loader atomic writes and remove unused import

1. registry-loader.ts: Use atomic file writes (temp file + rename)
   - Prevents cache/meta corruption on process crash mid-write
   - Consistent with credentials.ts and manifest.ts patterns

2. api-client.ts: Remove unused Credentials type import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
